title: Ben Sean
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Ben Sean''' is a comic book colorist who worked on a few issues of the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series.

{{Artist-stub}}

==Star Wars bibliography==
===Colorist===
*[[Star Wars (1977) 25|''Star Wars'' (1977) 25]]
*''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 2: Dark Encounters]]''
